title: API for creating a new build / deploy
excerpt:
Hi there, 
I’m wondering if there is (or there will be) an API for uploading a file for deploying a new version of my app by creating a new build/release? 
Thank you.

posts.author: v-appgami (Antonio)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

I’m wondering if there is (or there will be) an API for uploading a file for deploying a new version of my app by creating a new build/release?

Thank you.

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @v-appgami - thank you for sharing this!

At the moment there is no way to achieve this through the API, the only way to upload/deploy a new build of your application would be through the developer section of your account on the website.

This being said I’ve gone ahead and passed this feedback internally to our team as a feature request to see if we can tackle this down the line - I definitely see how something like this would be useful.

-Daniel
